case_title: BOX BROTHERS OF NORTHERN CA LLC VS. DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BOX BROTHERS OF NORTHERN CA LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (MAILED TO:R. MASSMAN CEO OF DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOX BROTHERS OF NORTHERN CA LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED SEP-15-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEPENDABLE HIGHWAY EXPRESS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
